gifts.name: Popup Program Base
gifts.tagline: Season coordinator, transport, storage, and liability coverage for guest activations.
gifts.description: One part-time season lead, vehicle/trailer time for kit moves, off-season storage, and liability coverage for popup activations at autumn events across Greater Sacramento.
benefits: Program base sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Backdrop Hardware Kit
gifts.tagline: Reusable step-and-repeat frame, rigging, and cases — deploy at every stop.
gifts.description: Coalition-owned hardware: step-and-repeat structure, weighted bases, rigging kit, and transport cases. Festival staff install and strike at each popup; sponsors supply print art for named backdrops.
benefits: Hardware kit sponsor recognition on website

gifts.name: Plaza Lantern Canopy
gifts.tagline: Strung lanterns over the plaza — dusk environmental design guests walk under.
gifts.description: A portable **plaza canopy**: festival-weighted poles, span rigging, and rows of LED or silk lanterns strung overhead so an open plaza reads Mid-Autumn at dusk. Coalition staff install and strike; pairs with host events that have a central walk-through area. Built for atmosphere, procession paths, and wide-angle photos — not a single-queue backdrop.
benefits: Onsite sponsor banner at funded popup

lineItems.label: LED / silk lantern fleet (rental or season purchase)

gifts.name: Lantern Wall
gifts.tagline: A wall of lanterns — vertical spectacle and photo backdrop in one.
gifts.description: A **lantern wall** install: modular frames or truss facing the plaza, dense rows of LED or silk lanterns, and ground uplights so the surface glows at dusk. Guests pose in front; creators shoot vertical. Smaller footprint than a full canopy — fits retail plazas, parish fair edges, and festival entry lanes.
benefits: Onsite sponsor banner at funded popup

gifts.name: Lantern Moon Backdrop
gifts.tagline: Hero photo moment — families and creators under the full moon.
gifts.description: The flagship popup set: a lantern-and-moon photo backdrop families queue for — the Mid-Autumn version of a Santa photo line. Includes printed backdrop art, dusk-friendly lighting, queue stanchions, and a facilitator to keep flow moving. Built for **Instagram Reels** and fridge photos alike.
benefits: Named on backdrop signage + queue banner
Facebook/Instagram unlock post + Reel featuring the set
Onsite sponsor banner at funded popup

gifts.name: Lantern Craft Station
gifts.tagline: Make a lantern, then take it to the photo line — hands-on Mid-Autumn.
gifts.description: Supplies and facilitator runbook for a make-a-lantern table before the backdrop. Kids leave with something to carry — natural pairing with **Lantern Moon Backdrop** or **Family Lantern Moment**. Same grammar as Children's Village craft slots, scaled for a popup footprint.
benefits: Onsite sponsor banner at funded popup

lineItems.label: Craft supplies (LED lantern kits, markers, ribbons)

gifts.name: Creator Photo Lane
gifts.tagline: Ring light, props, and a hashtag board — built for creators and UGC.
gifts.description: A compact creator lane beside the main backdrop: ring light, subtle GLF branding, props table, and a printed hashtag board. Invited creators and walk-up guests get a dedicated spot for vertical video without blocking the family queue.

gifts.name: Family Lantern Moment
gifts.tagline: Queued family portraits — stroller-friendly, grandma in frame.
gifts.description: A dedicated family portrait flow: numbered tickets, stroller corral, bench seating, and a photographer slot (contractor or trained volunteer). Less spectacle than the moon backdrop — more **fridge photo** and **grandparent gift** energy.
benefits: Onsite sponsor banner at funded popup

gifts.name: Deployment Stop
gifts.tagline: One popup day — load-in, strike, and two volunteers.
gifts.description: Operational add-on for a single deployment: transport to site, load-in, strike, and two volunteer shifts. Does not name a host event — sponsorship team assigns the stop when a partner confirms.
benefits: Deployment sponsor thank-you on social media

gifts.name: Extra Craft Session
gifts.tagline: Second facilitator block when Lantern Craft Station is funded.
gifts.description: Adds a second 3-hour craft session on the same day — useful for high-traffic stops where the first table stays full. Requires **Lantern Craft Station** in your build.

sponsorTiers.label: Supporter
sponsorTiers.tagline: Name on the website and a thank-you mention
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any popup stories you fund.
benefits: Thank-you in email blast to mailing lists

sponsorTiers.label: Bronze
sponsorTiers.tagline: Entry recognition with logo and light social
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any popup stories you fund.
benefits: Name in email blast to mailing lists

sponsorTiers.label: Silver
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any popup stories you fund.
benefits: Logo row in email blast to mailing lists
Onsite sponsor banner at funded popup

sponsorTiers.label: Gold
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any popup stories you fund.
benefits: Dedicated block in email blast to mailing lists
Onsite sponsor banner at every funded popup

sponsorTiers.label: Diamond
sponsorTiers.description: Recognition tier for your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any popup stories you fund.
benefits: Lantern Moon Backdrop naming credit when funded
Onsite sponsor banner at every funded popup
